title: Automate new group creation based on formula instead of static text
excerpt: There is currently one automation that reads the following Every time period, create new group. While this is very cool the group is static and it doesn’t support dynamic formulas. For instance I would like every Monday …

posts.author: kallikakis (Nikos Kallikakis)
posts.cookedHtml: There is currently one automation that reads the following Every time period, create new group. While this is very cool the group is static and it doesn’t support dynamic formulas. For instance I would like every Monday to create a new group and for the name to be prefixed with current week number. Custom formulas are supported at the column level, it would be great to have the flexibility to define dynamic names

posts.author: hseitz (Hayden Seitz)
posts.cookedHtml:
This would be useful for us too. I am setting up Scrum project management boards, and I’d like to create a new group for every month, e.g. “October 2022”, “November 2022”, etc.

Without dynamic names, I assume I will have to have the automation name the new group “New Milestone” and then I’ll have to rename it to the current month name at the beginning of each new month
